note: Magazine RSS/Atom feeds the LLM start-list robot (scripts/ingest-pro-starts-llm.mjs) scans for 'start list' articles in ANY language. Direct article URLs (no Google-redirect). ADD A SOURCE = one entry (name + rss + lang). The robot only LLM-processes items whose title looks like a start list and that pass a free pre-filter; extracted athletes are kept only if they match our known pro set (no hallucinated athletes). Needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (else the robot no-ops). NOTE: triathlon.de is intentionally NOT here — its start-list tables are parsed for free by ingest-pro-starts-media.mjs. tri247.com blocks bots (403); trimax-magazine.fr / mundotriatlon unreachable — revisit later.
